calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Terminating Sanctions is Off calendar as moot. The court granted defendant's motion for summary judgment on 10/14/22.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff SANDRA FUNES (Tel: 650-455-4529) in pro per;
Atty. CARMEN LEON, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Officce (Tel: 415-554-3966) for defendant City and County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Regarding plaintiff's request for a trial continuance, the Court informs the plaintiff that such a request must be made to the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

City and County of San Francisco's unopposed motion for summary judgement is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Dawn Stark, CSR No. 7847, Email: dawn.999.sf@gmail.com (302/VP)

Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CARMEN LEON, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3966) for defendant City and County of San Francisco;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Sanctions.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF SANDRA FUNES SHALL ATEND AND SUBMIT TO A DEPOSITION IN THIS MATTER.
(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF SANDRA FUNES IN THE ANOUNT OF THREE (3) THOUSAND DOLLARS, PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PAYMENT OF WHICH NUST BE MADE WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.
(3) THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION OF THIS MATTER AND IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE PROVISIONS OF PARAGRAPH 1 ABOVE, UPON PRESENTATION THE COURT WILL ENTER AN ORDER DISMISSING THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORD FORM TO THE COURT BY EMAIL TO RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM.
